title: Trbovlje, Trbovlje — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Trbovlje is a city in Trbovlje with a population of 14,000. A town in the Zasavje region, known for its mining heritage, the iconic Trbovlje Power Plant chimney (one of Europe’s tallest), and a strong community spirit.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
